description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a simple, unadorned terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The plant itself has a slender, slightly curved central stem with several large, broad, heart-shaped green leaves branching out at various heights. The leaves are vibrant and healthy, with visible veins and a natural, slightly glossy texture. The pot is cylindrical with a subtle lip at the top and appears to be made of clay or terracotta, giving it a matte, earthy appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or labels on the pot or plant. The overall look suggests a common houseplant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A healthy green plant with broad leaves grows from a plain terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The pot is simple and unadorned, and the plant's leaves are large and heart-shaped.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from the side, showing the main stem and several large leaves extending outward, with the pot's lip and soil clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the dense cluster of leaves on one side, partially obscuring the stem and giving the plant a fuller appearance.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from above and at an angle, revealing the arching stem and the spread of leaves, as well as the open top of the pot and soil surface.
description_view_3: A more direct view of the plant's stem and symmetrical leaf arrangement, with the pot's round shape and soil clearly visible.
attribute_plant_species: bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris) or similar broadleaf seedling
